name: Willie Pickens
abstract: Willie Pickens (April 18, 1931 – December 12, 2017) was an American jazz pianist, composer, arranger, and educator.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: A Tribute to "Trane"

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: Eddie's band was Willie Pickens on piano... I subbed for Harold.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Segal
about_quotes.evidence: Willie Pickens is teaching a lot of people, and sometimes when he’s on the bill, he’ll have them come up and play
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Segal — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Wilbur Ware
about_quotes.evidence: Vernell had Willie Pickens on piano, a wonderful Chicago pianist
